title: Jamaican Savory Casserole
description: A flavorful and dense Jamaican-inspired casserole with mozzarella cheese.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the Jamaican seasoning and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the savory and dense ingredients and cook until the savory is lightly browned.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese evenly over the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
